_comment: Slack app manifest for the AgentCore Reference shared production app. Paste this into api.slack.com → (existing app) → App Manifest to apply, or → Create New App → From an app manifest to bootstrap a fresh one. For local dev, replace https://agent.example.com with your ngrok hostname before pasting. Keep oauth_config.scopes.bot in sync with bridge/bridge/slack_oauth.py::_SCOPES — the bridge rebuilds its authorize URL from that constant, so any drift here silently breaks new installs. Keep interactivity.request_url in sync with bridge/bridge/main.py::slack_interactions — interactivity must be enabled for assistant.threads.setStatus thinking indicators and for the confirm/deny action buttons.

display_information.name: agentcore
display_information.description: Internal-ops AI agent for alert triage, team Q&A, and workflow automation.
